title: Triplast Pallet Stretch Shrink Wrap Roll (400mm x 250m) - Pick Qty & Colour - Heavy Duty Pallet Wrap, Industrial Stretch Wrap, Packaging Cling Film, Strong Plastic Wrap, Luggage Wrap (Black, 2 Rolls)
features: INDUSTRIAL STRENGTH: Made using co-extruded & blended 17mu thick high-performance cast film (with 30% recycled content) to offer the commercial-grade durability & tear-resistance needed to protect against scratches, scuffs & rough handling

STRETCHABLE, FLEXIBLE & SELF-ADHERING: Stretches & wraps around odd-shaped objects or bundled items with sharp corners without tearing and also clings & sticks to itself without leaving any adhesive residue

PROTECT & PRESERVE WITHOUT CONCEALING: Glossy surface actively repels dirt, dust, oil, grease, water & moisture while the clear finish keeps the contents easily identifiable, distinguishable & scannable

ONE-PERSON HANDHELD USE: Effortlessly peels off its reinforced cardboard core (1.5" inner diameter) for easy application both, with or without a dispenser - compatible with standard 400mm pallet wrap dispensers

MULTIPURPOSE: Designed for use in industrial warehouses to wrap pallets & pack items for shipping or as protective wrapping for furniture, frames, china, appliances & all sorts of fragile items for moving house & self storage
description: Product Description Triplast Pallet Stretch Wrap (also known as shrink wrap, industrial cling film or luggage wrap) is commonly used as protective wrapping for pallets and to pack or bundle items together for shipping & storage . It is also widely used to protect luggage, boxes, furniture, appliances & other odd shaped items when moving . Heavy Duty Protection: Manufactured in the UK from high performance cast film (with 30% recycled content ), these 400mm wide , & 250m long rolls with 17mu film thickness are designed to offer high tensile strength, durability & flexibility in order to protect against scratches, scuffs & rough handling without tearing or fraying. Their glossy black (opaque) finish actively repels dirt, dust, oil, water & moisture thereby keeping your items in pristine condition for longer while also concealing them from prying eyes. Easy & Hassle-free Use: What makes Triplast Pallet Stretch Wrap an absolute packaging essential is its ability to instantly cling & stick to itself securely without leaving any adhesive residue or loosing adhesiveness over time. No more messing about with tape or glue! It effortlessly peels of its reinforced cardboard core (1.5 inch inner core diameter) for easy one-person handheld application and is usable both, with or without a dispenser (compatible with standard 400mm pallet wrap dispensers).
